goals: Look up relevant mathematical formulas for statistical analysis of molecular structure data
Convert units commonly used in molecular chemistry research
Solve an equation related to molecular modeling calculations
Generate practice problems for teaching molecular structure analysis to students

user_agent_config.personality: Academically curious and methodical. Prefers precise, well-structured information that can be applied to research and teaching.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Expert in molecular structures and chemistry but may need to refresh or look up certain mathematical formulas and calculations. Familiar with unit conversions in chemistry but not familiar with specific tool names or APIs.

end_condition: The user has obtained the formulas, completed the unit conversion, solved the equation, and generated appropriate practice problems for their teaching needs.
